text:
IWM Policies
Policy
dynamic-rate-limiting-ingress
disk-write-blocking
tomalloc-release-rate
execution-control
query-sentinel
auto-restart
dynamic-connection-establishment-rate-limiting
dynamic-eviction-worker
What It Does
Throttles incoming ops when CPU/memory overloaded
Blocks writes when disk usage exceeds threshold
Tunes memory release back to O5
Manages query concurrency limits
Monitors/controls long-running queries
Handles automatic server restart logic
Limits new connection rate
Tunes WiredTiger cache eviction
Key Parameters Modified
ingressRequestAdmissionRatePerSec, ingressRequestRateLimiterEnabled
Write concern blocking
Malloc release rate
Execution control tickets
Query kill thresholds
Restart signals
Connection rate params
Eviction worker settings
